blocks.text: Norway's greatest night: Bodo/Glimt carry 3-1 to San Siro
TV2 warns Bodo/Glimt face what may be the world's best player tonight — but Glimt arrive at the Meazza with a three-goal cushion and history within touching distance.
🎮 13:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) features in DraculaN S5: 100 Thieves vs MANA
